release_notes: v0.9.1 — Brand, feature, and channel additions in Knowledge now show up in Visibility and Trends immediately, no restart needed. Fixed the 'Mention Rank' denominator on the Visibility and Intelligence pages to count all tracked brands, not just ones with a mention. Added explanatory (ⓘ) info icons to every KPI tile across Home, Visibility, Intelligence, and Trends, clarifying what each number means and how it differs from similar-looking numbers elsewhere in the app. Visibility page's control panel redesigned — Providers and Run/Pause/Stop controls are now always visible, only the Prompt Sets list collapses. Cleaned up wasted header space on the Intelligence and Trends pages.
